{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blackflame cycling chamber
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blackflame cycling chamber]] is where [[Orthos]] was devouring a dragon-spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
